articles.headline: Towards Environmentally Sustainable Aviation: A Review on Operational Optimization

It also highlights emerging trends and gaps for future research in sustainable aviation.
articles.takeaway: Integrating advanced technologies across airline, airport, and flight operations offers a critical pathway to reconcile rising air traffic demand with environmental sustainability requirements.
keywords: aviation; optimization; operations research; sustainability; environmental impacts
